mapper.select: SELECT user_id, login_id, user_nm, pwd_hash_val, acnt_status_cd, del_yn, pwd_init_req_yn, pwd_chg_dtm, temp_pwd_expire_dtm, sec_ver FROM tb_sys_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_sys_user SET pwd_hash_val = #{newPasswordHash}, pwd_chg_dtm = #{completedAt}, pwd_init_req_yn = 'N', temp_pwd_expire_dtm = NULL, sec_ver = #{newSecurityVersion}, login_fail_cnt = 0, email_addr = COALESCE(#{emailAddress}, email_addr), mobile_no = COALESCE(#{mobileNumber}, mobile_no), mod_id = #{userId}, mod_dtm = #{completedAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND acnt_status_cd = 'ACTIVE' AND del_yn = 'N' AND pwd_init_req_yn = 'Y' AND sec_ver = #{expectedSecurityVersion} AND pwd_chg_dtm = #{expectedPasswordChangedAt} AND temp_pwd_expire_dtm > #{completedAt}
